headline: Hantavirus: What to Know About the Virus—and Why Moderna Stock Rallied
summary: Evercore ISI analysts cautioned investors, writing Thursday that “with regards to current headlines, we see no meaningful revenue opportunity.”

headline: Moderna stock jumps 10% amid hantavirus outbreak concerns
summary: Investing.com -- Moderna (NASDAQ:MRNA) shares climbed 10% on Thursday as concerns mounted over a hantavirus outbreak connected to a cruise ship.

raw.headline: Moderna stock jumps 10% amid hantavirus outbreak concerns

headline: Top S&P500 movers in Thursday's pre-market session
summary: As we await the opening of the US market on Thursday, let's delve into the pre-market session and discover the S&P500 top gainers and losers shaping the early market sentiment.

headline: Moderna Shareholders OK Directors, Executive Pay Votes and Ernst & Young as 2026 Auditor at AGM
summary: Moderna (NASDAQ:MRNA) shareholders approved all four management proposals at the company’s 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders, including the re-election of two directors, advisory votes related to executive compensation, and the ratification of Ernst & Young as the company’s independent auditor
